title: INIT-2.2.2 — Proof Validator

r_level_check.note: No R-level artifacts required for this diff (2 changed files, no schema/contract changes)

invariants_asserted: Mis-bound bundles rejected — mergeSha must be exactly 40 hex chars, sentinels rejected
Stale bundles rejected — configurable maxAgeMs, default 7 days
Hash-tampered bundles rejected — validationHash recomputed from artifacts
ProofValidationGateError thrown on any rejection — certification halted
AuditEvent emitted for every validation (pass or fail)
No I/O, Supabase, or HTTP — pure data structure
